text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Walking through the academy halls one lunchtime, I happen to spot a
familiar face on the other side of a classroom window.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: The seven of hearts should be over here on the right...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, hello Trainer. I'm playing pairs.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I've nearly flipped all the cards, and with this I should... Huh?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Aw, I've forgotten where everything is now...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: No, you don't have to apologize. I just need to concentrate harder.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In silence, Suzuka lays the cards face down once again.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: All right. This time for sure.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? Y-yes, that's right. It's pretty fun, you know, solo pairs.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I've imposed a limit on the number of mistakes I can make, so it's still
challenging.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And she certainly possesses the mentality to strictly adhere to that
limit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Since I'm here now, however, I propose a two-player game.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You want... to play? Um, well...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, sorry. You took me a bit by surprise...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... okay. Let's give it a shot. May the sharpest thinker win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We begin our game of double pairs.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Aw, that wasn't it. Okay, your turn.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are only a few cards left on the desk. I hit a lucky streak,
snatching up pairs one after another.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? Those too? No! I had my eyes on them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Despite Suzuka's protests, I continue to flip over pair after pair.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Aw, you keep taking the cards that I'm after...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
My favorite part is when I can flip over a bunch of cards at the end of
a game without anyone getting in the way...
choice_data_list: Is that why you were playing by yourself?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Yes.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but please don't worry about that. I agreed to your invitation to
play together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It appears I was a bit of a distraction after all.
choice_data_list: (I think it's best I bow out now.)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Trainer, is something wrong? I'm going to lay the cards out again.
choice_data_list: Huh? You want to keep going?
Huh? You want to keep going?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, and I won't let you distract me this time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We continue playing until Silence Suzuka has a good number of wins
to her name.
